dvids.title: Latest Wave of U.S. Strikes Against Iran Completed
dvids.desc: Video footage released of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) launching aircraft and precision munitions against Iranian military targets, released July 15, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: Latest Wave of U.S. Strikes Against Iran Completed
dvids.desc: TAMPA Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) ended an evening wave of strikes against Iran at 9 p.m. ET on July 15.

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Disable Non-Compliant Vessel in Arabian Gulf
dvids.desc: U.S. forces enforce naval blockade measures against Iran, July 15, by disabling an unladen oil tanker attempting to sail toward an Iranian port in the Arabian Gulf. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: U.S. Forces Disable Non-Compliant Vessel in Arabian Gulf
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces enforced naval blockade measures against Iran, July 15, by disabling an unladen oil tanker attempting to sail toward an Iranian port in the Arabian Gulf.
